findings.title: Core security controls are well-implemented
findings.description: ValidatedRoot (9 tests + fuzz), Process (5 tests + fuzz), secrets scanner (2 tests) form a strong three-layer defense
findings.recommendation: Maintain this standard. Continue fuzzing on every CI run.

findings.title: Secret redaction policy not enforced at code level
findings.description: AGENTS.md mandates secret redaction before all output, but no centralized redact_secrets() function exists. Each crate must independently ensure compliance.
findings.recommendation: Implement redact_secrets() in lode-core as mandatory filter for all output paths (logs, errors, MCP responses, LSP diagnostics).

findings.title: MCP server lacks input validation layer
findings.description: 1 MB size limit exists but no schema validation before dispatch. No input logging or rate limiting.
findings.recommendation: Add JSON Schema validation layer between transport and tool dispatch. Add per-tool rate limiting.

findings.title: Daemon IPC has no authentication
findings.description: Any local process can connect to daemon socket and send Stop/Pause/Restart commands. Unix socket permissions depend on umask.
findings.recommendation: Add token-based authentication. Generate random token on daemon start. Require in IPC requests.

findings.title: Plugin security model lacks enforcement tests
findings.description: Plugin receipts track permissions but no runtime enforcement. No sandboxing. No tests.
findings.recommendation: Add runtime permission checks and enforcement tests. Consider sandboxing for execute permission.

findings.title: Two advisory ignores in deny.toml without review dates
findings.description: RUSTSEC-2024-0436 (paste unmaintained) and RUSTSEC-2026-0002 (lru stacked borrows) ignored without expiration or review dates.
findings.recommendation: Add review dates to ignores. Check if ratatui has updated these transitive deps.

findings.title: MCP STDIO transport has no encryption
findings.description: Only STDIO transport implemented. HTTP transport with TLS is planned but not implemented. Limitation not documented.
findings.recommendation: Document transport limitation. Add TLS when HTTP transport is implemented.

findings.title: LSP diagnostics may expose secrets to editor
findings.description: Diagnostics include raw secret finding details (type, line, content preview). Editors may sync or store these.
findings.recommendation: Add config option to redact secret values from diagnostic details. Default to redacted.

findings.title: Template recursion bound is adequate
findings.description: Recursion bound of 16 levels. safe_template_reference() blocks traversal paths. 9 tests confirm.

findings.title: CI/CD pipeline has no secret scanning gate
findings.description: CI runs audit, deny, clippy, test, but no lode scan secrets step. Secrets committed accidentally won't be caught.
findings.recommendation: Add lode scan secrets to CI pipeline.

findings.title: Extensions lack binary path validation and tests
findings.description: All three extensions execute lode binary as subprocess. None validate binary path. No test suites.
findings.recommendation: Add binary path validation in extensions. Add test suites.

findings.title: Git hook ownership tracking is adequate
findings.description: Hooks marked with lode-managed marker. Only lode-managed hooks removed on uninstall.
